modules.name: ovos_messagebus.load_config
documentation:
Message bus configuration loader.

The message bus event handler and client use basically the same configuration.
This code is re-used in both to load config values.

functions.name: ovos_messagebus.load_config.load_message_bus_config
documentation: Load the bits of device configuration needed to run the message bus.

modules.name: ovos_messagebus.__main__
documentation:
Message bus service for mycroft-core

The message bus facilitates inter-process communication between mycroft-core
processes. It implements a websocket server so can also be used by external
systems to integrate with the Mycroft system.
